mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, price, stock, category_id, merchant_id, image_url, status, created_at, updated_at FROM t_product WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, name, description, price, stock, category_id, merchant_id, image_url, status, created_at, updated_at FROM t_product
AND category_id = #{categoryId}
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND status = 1
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_product (name, description, price, stock, category_id, merchant_id, image_url, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{categoryId}, #{merchantId}, #{imageUrl}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE t_product SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_product SET stock = stock - #{quantity}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND stock >= #{quantity}
